EXAMPLE 2: 

SN x 2-4/wk x 4 wk; 1-2/wk x 4 wk for skilled observation and evaluation of the surgical 
site. 

Orders for services to be furnished "as needed" or "PRN" must be accompanied by a 
description of the patient's medical signs and symptoms that would occasion a visit and a 
specific limit on the number of those visits to be made under the order before an 
additional physician or allowed practitioner order would have to be obtained. 

30.2.4 - Who Signs the Plan
